instruments.instrument_form: source anchored stub or low evidence packet
instruments.input: source search, missing body text, replacement packet, or archive adjudication
instruments.operation: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. The package is a low-stakes decision-archive. Read order is trivial (status — recap — note). For a downstream agent, the highest-value follow-on is verifying official or chapter-level InfraGard process guidance against the heuristic estimates in this packet, then producing an email template for a status-check after the 12-week window. Wire or preserve the implementation files: None.

instruments.instrument_name: InfraGard preparatory note (minimal) Source Recovery Lane
instruments.instrument_form: source anchored stub or low evidence packet
instruments.input: original source folder, authoring history, related packet, or version cluster
instruments.operation: Research design, evidence evaluation, forecasting, and judgment. Use source library method and reasoning sources as public method and source background. Vision: Make methodology pages legible as research-design, evidence-control, and interpretive-method systems. Mechanism: Extract argument, warrant, close reading, corpus method, reasoning, evidence, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Strengthen source governance, evidence workbench, capstone, and Nexus method pages. Status: source library identified as candidate.
